name: Bahrain
summary: Hosts US Navy 5th Fleet HQ. Hit by Iranian strikes. Bapco declared force majeure. Air raid sirens activated across Bahrain early Sunday March 29 alongside Kuwait and Israel — broadest simultaneous regional bombardment of the conflict. Interior Ministry urged citizens to shelter.

signals.content: Iranian strikes targeted US Navy 5th Fleet HQ in Manama and Crowne Plaza Hotel.
Bahrain's Bapco declared force majeure after waves of Iranian strikes targeted energy installations. 3 people killed.

Air raid sirens activated across Bahrain early Sunday March 29. Bahrain Interior Ministry urged citizens to take shelter and 'remain calm.' Simultaneous sirens across Kuwait, Bahrain, and Israel — broadest regional bombardment pattern of the conflict. Consistent with CSIS assessment that Iran has abandoned calibrated retaliation for 'unbridled escalation.' Bushehr nuclear plant (across the Persian Gulf from Bahrain) struck for third time in 10 days — Kuwait issued warning about potential radioactive leak risk from Bushehr. (Sources: Middle East Eye, Bahrain Interior Ministry, CNN)

edges.context: Targeted because it hosts US 5th Fleet. 3 killed. Energy infrastructure damaged. Air raid sirens March 29 from Iranian missile/drone attacks.
US Navy 5th Fleet HQ in Manama. Critical for US naval operations in Gulf.
